# Vaagai Tamil Sangam (வாகை தமிழ்ச்சங்கம்)

Vaagai Tamil Sangam is a registered, non-profit socio-cultural volunteer organization in Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to the promotion, development, and propagation of the Tamil language, literature, and culture.

## Key Links
- [Homepage](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/)
- [About Us](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/about/)
- [Activities](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/activities/)
- [Competitions & Awards](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/competitions/)
- [Publications](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/publications/)
- [Sponsorship](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/sponsorship/)
- [Contact](https://vaagaitamilsangam.com/contact/)

## Core Programs
- **Vaagai Sooda Vaa**: Weekly/monthly language development and speaking skills enhancement sessions.
- **Syllabus & Curriculum**: Tailored curricula for Tamil language learners of various age groups.
- **Monthly Competitions**: Contests scheduled around the Tamil calendar months (e.g., Chithirai, Aani, Aavani) offering various titles/awards.
- **Publications & Journals**: Internal journal (IJVAAGAI) with E-ISSN: 3107-9202 focusing on Tamil literary research.
